task: C0 M1 Correction 3 Real UI Inspector Launch
owner_observed_issue_disposition: FIXED: Dock and Rail were translating beneath early physical clicks during their 550 ms Motion entrance; locator QA waited for stabilization and masked the real coordinate race.
FIXED: Table composition removed Rail, Dock and the only WidgetHost, leaving no real Inspector command path outside Canvas.
Both actual controls now share data-command=open-inspector with fixed geometry, truthful active/expanded/focused state and click, Enter and Space activation in Canvas and Table.
No stale launcher, duplicate Inspector, covering element, canvas pointer capture, z-index or pointer-events interception was reproduced after the entrance settled.
verification_summary: PASS: every src/**/*.test.ts contract plus audit-utils 4/4, including affected M1 and C0.4F-A renderer, history, persistence, export and widget lifecycle coverage.
PASS: npx tsc -b --pretty false with zero diagnostics.
PASS: real-shell production-browser integration uses physical CDP pointer/keyboard input only and contains no store action, openWidget helper, window.lab or isolated lifecycle proof.
PASS: no-selection, closed, minimized, background, partly off-screen, Canvas, Table, Dock, Rail, repeated activation, Enter and Space each produce exactly one full viewport-contained Inspector.
PASS 1440x900: Dock 542,839 to 572,869; Rail 30,371 to 60,401; actual target BUTTON; recovered Inspector 11.81,92 to 343.81,488.78.
PASS 1280x800: Dock 462,739 to 492,769; Rail 30,321 to 60,351; actual target BUTTON; recovered Inspector 11.81,92 to 343.81,488.78; no document overflow.
PASS: git diff --check from c4f05a1b32029c6cb29f4cfaa41983ba7f77c8f9 through the fixed commit.
PASS: exactly one final npm run build; main artifact 984.47 kB and 316.13 kB gzip; accepted Vite large-chunk warning only.
known_limitations: Membrane Field and Edge are shared project fields and therefore edit Project Defaults rather than disconnected per-Cell overrides.
Organism has no truthful vector Membrane path; M1 does not synthesize one.
Advanced instruments, selection-orbit treatment and Symbol remain assigned to M2 inside the same Inspector.
M2 Membrane Field Edge Softness remains the existing field/body feather owner; independent Membrane Edge Softness is a future separate Edge owner and must not alias it.
Optional Void Inner Echo is M2-only, default off, and requires canonical live/export parity.
Material Browser remains assigned to M4.
The in-app browser does not expose file-saver transport as a download event; product completion state and deterministic export contracts were verified.
